rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped literature citation to support a broad claim that prior research has recognized the distinctive nature of really new products. The citing paper does not develop its hypotheses, measures, or empirical design from this specific source; its core framework is built around Hoeffler (2003), temporal distance/construal, and mental simulation. There is no distinct discussion of Moreau et al. (2001)'s mechanisms or findings, so the citation functions as background positioning only.
